records.question: Who are the employees aged at most 29 where city is Wasps?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT employee.employee_id FROM employee
WHERE employee.age <= 29 AND employee.city = 'Wasps'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Employee_ID FROM employee WHERE Age <= 29 AND City = 'Wasps'

records.question: Which employees named George Chuter are at least 23 years old and live in Bristol?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT employee.employee_id FROM employee
WHERE employee.city = 'Bristol' AND employee.name = 'George Chuter' AND employee.age >= 23
records.pred_sql: SELECT Employee_ID FROM employee WHERE City = 'Bristol' AND Name = 'George Chuter' AND Age >= 23

records.question: Who are the employees from Bristol working part-time since 2011 at FC Lahti, managed by Ilkka Mäkelä, where the shop is located in Lahti’s Lahden Stadion district with exactly 15000 products?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT employee.employee_id FROM employee
JOIN hiring ON employee.employee_id = hiring.employee_id
JOIN shop ON hiring.shop_id = shop.shop_id
WHERE shop.district = 'Lahden Stadion' AND shop.location = 'Lahti' AND shop.manager_name = 'Ilkka Mäkelä' AND hiring.start_from = '2011' AND hiring.is_full_time = 'F' AND employee.city = 'Bristol' AND shop.name = 'FC Lahti' AND shop.number_products = 15000
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT e.Employee_ID
FROM employee e
JOIN hiring h ON e.Employee_ID = h.Employee_ID
JOIN shop s ON h.Shop_ID = s.Shop_ID
WHERE e.City = 'Bristol'
AND h.Start_from = '2011'
AND h.Is_full_time = 'F'
AND s.District = 'Lahden Stadion'
AND s.Location = 'Lahti'
AND s.Manager_name = 'Ilkka Mäkelä'
AND s.Name = 'FC Lahti'
AND s.Number_products = 15000

records.question: Who is the employee named George Chuter from Bristol working in shops located in the Tehtaan kenttä district that have at least 3516 products?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT employee.employee_id FROM employee
JOIN hiring ON employee.employee_id = hiring.employee_id
JOIN shop ON hiring.shop_id = shop.shop_id
WHERE shop.district = 'Tehtaan kenttä' AND shop.number_products >= 3516 AND employee.city = 'Bristol' AND employee.name = 'George Chuter'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT e.Employee_ID
FROM employee e
JOIN hiring h ON e.Employee_ID = h.Employee_ID
JOIN shop s ON h.Shop_ID = s.Shop_ID
WHERE e.City = 'Bristol'
AND e.Name = 'George Chuter'
AND s.District = 'Tehtaan kenttä'
AND s.Number_products >= 3516

records.question: Who is named Mark Regan and is not a full-time employee?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT employee.employee_id FROM employee
JOIN hiring ON employee.employee_id = hiring.employee_id
WHERE hiring.is_full_time = 'F' AND employee.name = 'Mark Regan'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT e.Employee_ID
FROM employee e
WHERE e.Name = 'Mark Regan'
AND EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM hiring h
  WHERE h.Employee_ID = e.Employee_ID
  AND h.Is_full_time = 0
)

records.question: Which employees started working in 2003?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT employee.employee_id FROM employee
JOIN hiring ON employee.employee_id = hiring.employee_id
JOIN shop ON hiring.shop_id = shop.shop_id
WHERE hiring.start_from = '2003'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT e.Employee_ID
FROM employee e
JOIN hiring h ON e.Employee_ID = h.Employee_ID
JOIN shop s ON h.Shop_ID = s.Shop_ID
WHERE h.Start_from = '2003'

records.question: Which employees named Tim Payne live in Wasps, are at most 29 years old, and started full-time work in 2013?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT employee.employee_id FROM employee
JOIN hiring ON employee.employee_id = hiring.employee_id
WHERE employee.name = 'Tim Payne' AND hiring.start_from = '2013' AND hiring.is_full_time = 'T' AND employee.age <= 29 AND employee.city = 'Wasps'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT e.Employee_ID
FROM employee e
WHERE e.Name = 'Tim Payne'
  AND e.Age <= 29
  AND e.City = 'Wasps'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM hiring h
    WHERE h.Employee_ID = e.Employee_ID
      AND h.Start_from = '2013'
      AND h.Is_full_time = 'T'
  )
